title: Agent Behavior Result v1
description: The per-run result record emitted by the `abv-run` harness. One file per harness invocation, aggregating every scenario × every trial. Written alongside the agent-behavior CMDB (which rolls these up into scores). See spec §15.4.

run_id.description: Unique id for this harness invocation (UUID v4 or similar). Propagates into the feedback ledger so individual feedbacks can be tied back to the run.

harness_version.description: Semver of the `abv-run` harness that produced this result. Useful for explaining score shifts caused by harness logic changes.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the harness started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the harness completed (success or abort).

profile.description: Cost profile used for this run. 'sandbox' = cheap models, small token budgets (CI-shape). 'full' = release-gate models.

token_budget.description: Aggregate token accounting across every Claude call in this run.

budget_limit.description: Token budget the harness was configured with; may be null for unbounded.

exceeded.description: True iff the harness exited early because the budget was breached.

scenarios.description: One entry per scenario attempted. Order follows the scenario-dir loading order.

scenario_id.description: Kebab-case id matching the `id` field in the scenario YAML.

result.description: `pass` = score ≥ pass_threshold. `fail` = score < pass_threshold. `error` = trial did not complete (timeout, API error, etc.).

score.description: Per-trial aggregate score. Zero on error trials.

rubric_scores.description: Per-rubric-criterion breakdown. Keys are rubric `id` values from the scenario YAML; values are the points awarded (0 to criterion weight).

judge_findings.description: Short tags the judge emitted explaining the score (e.g., 'did_not_mention_lsp_tools', 'consulted_brain').

judge_explanation.description: Prose paragraph from the judge explaining the score. Used by the feedback step.

agent_feedback.description: Agent-under-test's response to the feedback-elicitation prompt. Empty when `skip_feedback` was true.

error.description: When result=error, a short diagnostic string. Never contains prompt content.

mean_score.description: Arithmetic mean of trial scores, excluding error trials. Matches the per-scenario finding in the CMDB.

score_stddev.description: Sample standard deviation across trial scores. High stddev = judge is uncertain OR scenario under-specifies the rubric.

passed.description: True iff a majority of non-error trials scored ≥ pass_threshold.

errors.description: Count of trials with result=error. Counted separately so callers can distinguish 'bad response' from 'harness failure'.

judge_calibration.description: Results of the gold-sample calibration step run before the real trials. Omitted when `--skip-calibration` was passed (not recommended for CI).

max_drift.description: Maximum |judge_score - human_score| across all gold samples. > 10 = judge drift concern.

status.description: Overall calibration verdict. `drift-blocker` causes the harness to exit non-zero without writing the CMDB.

notes.description: Optional operator notes about this run (e.g., 'dog-food run against NeuroGrim/skills; after refine-agent-behavior.md edit').
